subcodes.first_line: Thy numerous letters were perused in the Most Great Prison, and thy complaints were hearkened unto. However, Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مراسلات متعدده شما در سجن اعظم ملاحظه شد و شکایتهای شما استماع گشت ولکن حق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings
